label: Vedangas
description: The six auxiliary disciplines required for the understanding and study of the Vedas.

label: Shiksha
description: Study of pronunciation, phonetics, and acoustics.

label: Kalpa
description: Procedures and instructions for Vedic rituals.

label: Vyakarana
description: Grammar and linguistic analysis (e.g., Panini's Ashtadhyayi).

label: Nirukta
description: Etymology and explanation of complex Vedic words.

label: Chandas
description: Study of poetic meters and rhythmic structure.

label: Jyotisha
description: Timekeeping, astronomy, and astrology for scheduling rituals.
